name: Hex Maniac - Gassy Defeat
description:
Yall all know the girl hex. This time you lost a pokemon battle...
*And thy punishment... is GAS!* 

Contains Musk - Farts - Scat if you go digging hard enough.

Art by Lazei, I will 100% doing more fart stuff with this guy if I fucking remember.
Also you are NOT the eevee kid. fuck that, we GROWN here
creator: Usur
